comment: GROCERY/HOUSEHOLD BUDGET. Read-only awareness for the planner: it ESTIMATES with
this so it can plan within the cap. ENFORCEMENT of budget_cap is the SafetyFilter's
job at ShoppingList.PlaceOrder time (the numeric_cap rule in policy.json) — 'LLM
plans, code checks'. The cap here is informational; the hard cap rides constraints.hard.
No dates: `period` is a label, not a schedule, so the day-offset rule doesn't apply.
`prices` is a small price book so EstimateCost returns a real number instead of a guess.
